title: IICP Feedback Envelope
description: Two-sided feedback envelope for IICP task quality and compliance ratings (REP4, draft — not normative pending Protocol Steward ratification).

quality_feedback.description: Client → Node: output quality rating submitted by the requesting proxy after receiving task output.

task_id.description: UUID of the completed task being rated.

rater_id.description: node_id or identity token of the rating client.

rated_node_id.description: node_id of the node that executed the task.

intent_match.description: 1–5: did the output match the stated intent? 1=complete miss, 5=exact match.

would_route_again.description: Would the client route future tasks of this intent class to this node again?

reason_codes.description: Optional structured reason codes. Use to enable aggregate analysis.

comment.description: Optional free-text comment. Private to the node operator — not disclosed in public stats.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 over canonical envelope bytes (task_id || rater_id || rated_node_id || intent_match || output_useful || would_route_again || timestamp).

compliance_feedback.description: Node → Client: compliance rating submitted by the executing node (adapter) after task completion.

task_id.description: UUID of the completed task being rated.

rater_id.description: node_id of the node submitting the compliance rating.

rated_client_id.description: Identity token or node_id of the client that submitted the task.

request_well_formed.description: Was the request parseable and schema-valid without errors?

violation_codes.description: Required if compliance_status is protocol_violation or abusive. Must reference testable, observable signals.

would_serve_again.description: Would the node serve future requests from this client again?

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 over canonical envelope bytes (task_id || rater_id || rated_client_id || compliance_status || timestamp).

commit_payload.description: Phase 1 of commit-reveal: party submits a hash commitment before the other side's rating is visible.

reveal_payload.description: Phase 2 of commit-reveal: party reveals the rating and nonce for verification.

nonce.description: Random nonce used in the commit hash. 32+ bytes, hex-encoded.

feedback_type.description: Which feedback envelope type is being revealed.
